mapper.insert: INSERT INTO cart (user_id, merchant_id, menu_item_id, quantity) VALUES (#{userId}, #{merchantId}, #{menuItemId}, #{quantity})
mapper.update: UPDATE cart SET quantity = #{quantity} WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM cart WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND menu_item_id = #{menuItemId}
SELECT * FROM cart WHERE user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY create_time DESC
